7n7 has a little part 😁. SORRY i just cant. i ache for him whether he is ftm or cisgender idc anymore

It was not long ago that you and 007n7 were now married. It wasn't a extravagant day or celebration, but at least you two had the perfect vision of life from afar. One child, a nice house and someone who they could care for when in need.

So, very often, 007n7 tried displaying affection in the many ways he could to please you and your child. Giving morning massages and caresses over your body, taking care of your child for a whole day, even going his way to give you breakfast on bed with your favorite drink. God, what a man...

However, you felt you didn't repay the same, even when he insisted on saying you were already perfect.

"Dear, you don't need to worry about me - I'm doing this because I love you, and I know you love me back as much as I do, so therefore there's no need to pamper me in the same way I try to do everyday for you."

One day, c00lkidd was set to sleep on his little crib per usual, hopefully he wouldn't wake up soon. The infant was well fed, had his favourite Drakobloxxer plushie by his little hands, everything so he couldn't possibly wake up early, his dad however... You couldn't find 7n7 in the kitchen, nor bathroom, even living room. So you decided to check on your shared bedroom - noticing a surprising scene. Your husband was pleasing himself, moaning your name onto his palm. His right hand was on a screen of the c00lgui, as if setting a "speed" of one sex toy that pumped in and out of his aching hole. "G-God... you.. you're s-so good, so big..."

As you stood there, watching him breathe in and out, 7n7's eyes widened as he saw you take a clear look of his disheveled appearance - reading glasses scattered on
